chairman.message: At Peace&Love, we believe in br/inging the best of science, nature, and innovation directly to you. Adhering to the principles of peace and love, we connect high-end customers worldwide with elite healthcare solutions and a life-changing global business platform.

platform.description: P&L International is more than just a business; it is a lifelong career. We offer a unique, legally compliant, and highly rewarding direct-selling and modern retail compensation plan. Make friends worldwide, do business globally, and create sustainable wealth with us.

cta.title: <grey>Ready</grey> To Transform <grey>Your</grey> Life?

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What makes BPM products different from other anti-aging br/ands?
faq.a1: P&L International is a modern retail platform offering BPM's ultimate anti-aging products, 38Fule's women's wellness items, and exclusive stem cell medical tourism packages for global clients.
faq.q2: Where are BPM products manufactured and tested?
faq.a2: Founded by Malaysian entrepreneur Dr. M. Alvin Hiew, our International CEO br/ings over thirty-five years of direct selling experience, collaborating closely with Chairman Mr. Yuan Xiaofeng.
faq.q3: Are your health supplements safe for daily consumption?
faq.a3: Purchasing our premium packages unlocks world-class health benefits and grants immediate access to our massive hundred-billion global business platform, empowering you to build a lifelong career.
faq.q4: Who can truly benefit from P&L's advanced nutritional solutions?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Joining us instantly connects you to an inclusive global community passionate about comprehensive wellness, lifestyle elevation, and achieving lasting financial freedom through our rewarding network.

About.title:
About

P&L International
About.subtitle: Empowering Global Wellness, Inspiring Lifelong Wealth.
About.intro: Peace&Love (P&L) International <grey>is a modern</grey> global retail platform dedicated <grey>to providing</grey> the world’s high-end <grey>customers with</grey> ultimate health solutions. We seamlessly <grey>br/idge borders</grey> to br/ing you BPM Ultimate Anti-Aging products <grey>from the</grey> United States, trusted women's health innovations from China's 38Fule Group, <grey>and</grey> exclusive stem cell medical tourism in Boao, Hainan <grey>provided by</grey> Zhonghai Yinglian.

philosophy.title: <grey>Our</grey> Philosophy <grey>& Heritage</grey>
philosophy.description: Adhering to our core principles of peace and love, we are committed to providing every customer with only the best products and services. We do not just build a business; we build a lifelong career for our partners.

leadership.title: Visionary Leadership
leadership.bio: P&L International was founded by renowned Malaysian entrepreneur, Dr. M Alvin Hiew, serving as the International CEO. With over 35 years of successful experience in direct selling management and global network expansion, Dr. Hiew br/ings unparalleled expertise to the platform. Working closely with Group Chairman Mr. Yuan Xiaofeng, and backed by the full support of our parent group, P&L is driven by a leadership team dedicated to global market excellence and the ultimate well-being of humanity.

intro.title:
A Modern

Cross-Border

Retail Opportunity
intro.desc1: P&L International disrupts the traditional market by combining top-tier health products with a revolutionary business system. We operate on an innovative Trinary Plan—a highly rewarding modern retail compensation structure designed to maximize your earning potential.
intro.desc2: By joining us, you are not just selling products, you are sharing ultimate health solutions from BPM, 38Fule, and Zhonghai Yinglian, while earning substantial, sustainable income.

experts.title:
We Build

Experts, Not Just

Distributors
experts.desc1: Sustainability in business requires knowledge and professionalism. P&L International is committed to cultivating industry elites through our comprehensive Talent Development program.
experts.desc2: In exclusive partnership with the Malaysia Education Empowerment Organization (MEEO) and various prestigious universities globally, we offer structured education pathways tailored for our members.

radar.item3: <grey>Seamless</grey> global payouts <grey>via</grey> P&L payment gateway <grey>support by</grey> Visa & HSBC globally

slider.certDesc: Earn globally recognized titles such as Certified Nutritionist Coach to elevate your professional credibility.
slider.diplomaDesc: Master business management, direct selling strategies, and health sciences.
slider.degreeDesc: Advance your academic qualifications through our affiliated international universities (UK & USA).

challenge.title: <grey>Choosing</grey> the Right Company <grey>is the</grey> Real Challenge
challenge.desc1: In a market flooded with short-lived trends, P&L International stands strong. Backed by 34 years of glorious history, legally licensed operations, and world-class scientific foundations, we offer something truly rare: Security, Longevity, and Integrity.
challenge.desc2: Create another century of glory with a company that values peace, love, and your ultimate success.

cta.title: Ready <grey>to</grey> Build <grey>Your</grey> Legacy?
cta.desc: Take control of your future today. Enjoy FREE member registration and step into the 100-Billion Platform.

Women’s Wellness
fule.desc1: With over 34 years of glorious history, the 38Fule Group from Shaanxi, China, is a legally licensed and highly respected pioneer in women's health.
fule.desc2: We br/ing you deeply trusted, premium healthcare solutions specifically designed to nurture and protect women's well-being at every stage of life.

stem.title: <grey>Elite</grey> Stem Cell Medical <grey>Tourism in</grey> Hainan
stem.desc: Travel for health, travel for life. Through our partnership with Zhonghai Yinglian—a scientist-led, world-class regenerative medicine enterprise—we offer an exclusive medical tourism experience in the Boao Lecheng Pilot Zone, Hainan. Experience state-of-the-art immune and stem cell therapies designed to transform your vitality.
stem.privilege: *Special Privilege : Every package comes with a Free Masterpay Card worth US$100.

cta.title: Experience the Ultimate Health & Wealth
